parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Foo1 #red
boundary Foo2
database Foo5
collections "I have a really\nlong name" as Foo6 #palegreen
entity Foo4
control "Foo3()" as Foo3

Foo1 -> Foo2 : To boundary
Foo1 -> Foo3 : To control
Foo1 -> Foo4 : To entity
Foo1 -> Foo5 : To database
Foo1 -> Foo6 : To collections
Foo1 -> Foo1 : To actor
@enduml
```
